requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Evidence and Tropical Marine Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全证据及热带海洋环境安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全證據及熱帶海洋環境安裝審查

summary.en: Solomon Islands EV charger projects should prepare IEC 61851-1 safety evidence for conductive EV supply equipment and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations. Because deployments may face high humidity, cyclones, salt mist, coastal flooding, weak grids, solar-hybrid systems, and limited maintenance access, safety review should include protective earthing, residual-current protection, isolation monitoring, emergency stop, enclosure IP rating, corrosion resistance, surge protection, ventilation, thermal derating, anchoring, and installation competency.
summary.zh: 所罗门群岛电动汽车充电桩项目应准备IEC 61851-1传导式电动汽车供电设备安全证据，直流站还应准备IEC 61851-23证据。由于部署环境可能面对高湿、气旋、盐雾、沿海洪涝、弱电网、光伏混合系统和维护通达性有限等问题，安全审查应包括保护接地、剩余电流保护、绝缘监测、急停、外壳IP等级、耐腐蚀、浪涌保护、通风、热降额、锚固和安装能力。
summary.zht: 索羅門群島電動汽車充電樁項目應準備IEC 61851-1傳導式電動汽車供電設備安全證據，直流站還應準備IEC 61851-23證據。由於部署環境可能面對高濕、氣旋、鹽霧、沿海洪澇、弱電網、光伏混合系統和維護通達性有限等問題，安全審查應包括保護接地、剩餘電流保護、絕緣監測、急停、外殼IP等級、耐腐蝕、浪湧保護、通風、熱降額、錨固和安裝能力。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures
IEC 60068 and IEC 61701 context for humidity, corrosion, and salt-mist testing where specified

summary.en: China's common baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements. It is useful for design review, but it includes China-specific connector, pilot, and communication assumptions and does not directly replace IEC 61851 test reports or project safety evidence for Solomon Islands installations.
summary.zh: 中国常用基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求。该标准可用于设计审查，但包含中国特有接口、导引和通信假设，不能直接替代所罗门群岛安装所需的IEC 61851测试报告或项目安全证据。
summary.zht: 中國常用基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求。該標準可用於設計審查，但包含中國特有接口、導引和通訊假設，不能直接替代索羅門群島安裝所需的IEC 61851測試報告或項目安全證據。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited safety reports where required, enclosure and impact certificates, earthing and residual-current protection design, and site installation instructions. Add humidity, cyclone anchoring, salt-mist corrosion, surge and lightning, spare-parts, sea-freight, and serviceability review for Honiara and outer-island deployments.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、按需提供认可安全报告、外壳及冲击证书、接地和剩余电流保护设计，以及现场安装说明。针对霍尼亚拉及外岛部署，还应增加湿热、气旋锚固、盐雾腐蚀、浪涌及防雷、备件、海运和可维护性审查。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、按需提供認可安全報告、外殼及衝擊證書、接地和剩餘電流保護設計，以及現場安裝說明。針對霍尼亞拉及外島部署，還應增加濕熱、氣旋錨固、鹽霧腐蝕、浪湧及防雷、備件、海運和可維護性審查。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where IEC safety evidence is required by the importer, site owner, utility, insurer, tender, donor project, or electrical installer
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 acceptance evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design input only. Solomon Islands projects should request IEC 61851 safety evidence and a site-specific tropical marine installation review, especially for Honiara, coastal, outer-island, solar-hybrid, and weak-grid deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487.1-2023只能作为设计输入。所罗门群岛项目应要求IEC 61851安全证据和场站特定热带海洋环境安装审查，尤其是霍尼亚拉、沿海、外岛、光伏混合和弱电网部署。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487.1-2023只能作為設計輸入。索羅門群島項目應要求IEC 61851安全證據和場站特定熱帶海洋環境安裝審查，尤其是霍尼亞拉、沿海、外島、光伏混合和弱電網部署。
